title: ヘリコプターの楽しみ方

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Afternoon classes are sooo draining. I wanna go hooome...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwup thwup thwup thwup!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Argh, what's that noise?! ...A helicopter?! Coming
this way? Are you kidding me?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Furl the sails, ye scallywags! Lower the anchor!
We're mooring this vessel!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Wrong idea! This isn't a ship, it's my private
helicopter!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yarrr, don't stress the details. It's like how soy
sauce and writing ink are members of the same
family!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Wait, that doesn't make any sense. What's
going on here?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I spotted her—couldn't believe my eyes at first,
but she was swimming backstroke across the
Pacific before I pulled her up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It turned into a real showdown once I switched to front crawl!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, all this has really put me behind schedule!
I have to hurry to a meeting. You should all return
to your classrooms!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Lame. I'm going back.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there, are your veins filled with ectoplasm
or something? You're in such a sorry state that
kicking your butt wouldn't even be fun.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Here, let me take you to a fantabulous
establishment.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Fantabulous?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sizzle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to Li'l Golshi's Barbecue Joint!
Table for one!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We take this and that from this transient world of
the living, then purify it into grilled ribs, tripe,
and beef tongue!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Beg pardon? Are you underestimating Li'l
Golshi's? Well then, I reckon the time's come for
my sweet ride to do its thing!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sweet ride? ...Wait, you mean that helicopter?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this baby's flappers bear a whole 'nother
name—the Despair-Banishing Wings of Glory!
...Basically, we're talking about a wicked large
ventilation fan here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We can use this beaut to blow all that blasted
smoke to kingdom come! Time to crank the
engine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WhirrrBWAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: This just makes it even more obvious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa immediately notices Gold Ship's
"restaurant" and gives her a severe scolding.
